text: ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 Ukrainian An-196 drones attacked at night the Novokuybyshevsk refinery near Samara. Oil infrastructure in Crimea and terminals in the Leningrad region were also targeted. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 乌克兰An-196无人机夜间袭击了萨马拉附近的新古比雪夫斯克炼油厂。克里米亚的石油基础设施和列宁格勒地区的终端也成为了目标。@wfwitness

text: WarTranslated Always wondered what the WW1 dogfights looked like. Now I know. Incredible footage of Ukrainian soldiers using a rifle to shoot Iranian Shahed 136 drones out the sky aboard a Soviet era Yak-52 training aircraft. Insanity… https://twitter.com/WarMonitor3/status/2045183501721362592/video/1 - WarMonitor 🇺🇦 🇬🇧 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一直想知道一战时期的空战是什么样子。现在我知道了。令人难以置信的镜头：乌克兰士兵乘坐苏联时代的雅克-52教练机，用步枪从空中击落伊朗沙赫德-136无人机。太疯狂了…… https://twitter.com/WarMonitor3/status/2045183501721362592/video/1 - WarMonitor 🇺🇦 🇬🇧 推文

text: WarTranslated RT @LvivJournal : On April 17, 2014, Horlivka city council member Volodymyr Rybak went to the russian-occupied government building to remove the DPR flag but he was surrounded by russian mercenaries & russified locals. Hours later he was kidnapped, tortured & thrown into a river where he drowned. https://twitter.com/LvivJournal/status/2045159806370000937/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 转推 @LvivJournal ：2014年4月17日，霍尔利夫卡市议会议员沃洛德米尔·雷巴克前往被俄罗斯占领的政府大楼拆除顿涅茨克人民共和国旗帜，但他被俄罗斯雇佣兵和俄罗斯化的当地人包围。几小时后，他被绑架、折磨并扔进河里溺亡。 https://twitter.com/LvivJournal/status/2045159806370000937/video/1 推文

text: A new round of U.S.–Iran talks may take place Monday in Pakistan, according to an Iranian official, though the U.S. hasn’t confirmed it. Source: CNN
text_zh: 据一位伊朗官员称，新一轮美伊会谈可能于周一在巴基斯坦举行，尽管美国尚未证实这一点。来源：CNN

text: While Trump keeps claiming victory, only 15% of Americans say Trump already achieved his Iran war goals. 25% think he will achieve them later. ~40% say he hasn’t / won’t / goals unclear. Just 38% support the strikes. Many think the goals are unclear or shifting. Source: Politico
text_zh: 尽管特朗普一直声称胜利，但只有15%的美国人认为特朗普已经实现了他的伊朗战争目标。25%的人认为他以后会实现。约40%的人认为他没有实现/不会实现/目标不明确。只有38%的人支持这些打击。许多人认为目标不明确或在不断变化。来源：Politico

text: Trump on Lebanon: It’s not really tied, but you could say maybe psychologically tied. But we’re going to help Lebanon become a country again. They’ve gone through a lot.
text_zh: 特朗普谈黎巴嫩：这并不是真的有关联，但你可以说也许在心理上有联系。但我们将帮助黎巴嫩再次成为一个国家。他们经历了很多。

text: Trump on Iran: Maybe I won’t extend the ceasefire. So you have a blockade, and unfortunately, we’ll have to start dropping bombs again.
text_zh: 特朗普谈伊朗：也许我不会延长停火协议。所以你们会面临封锁，不幸的是，我们将不得不再次开始投掷炸弹。

text: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Another Spy Network Suspected in Israeli Air Force: Two Soldiers Arrested for Spying for Iran Shin Bet and police are investigating a new serious security incident. Military police criminal investigations head Lee Ayash revealed Friday that two Israeli Air Force soldiers have been detained for about a month on suspicion of spying for Iranian intelligence while serving. The suspects allegedly transmitted sensitive information on military systems, locations, and senior figures. Additional soldiers, including from sensitive units like air defense, were arrested early in the probe. The case is ongoing. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇱 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 以色列空军内又现疑似间谍网：两名士兵因涉嫌为伊朗从事间谍活动被捕。辛贝特（Shin Bet）和警方正在调查一起新的严重安全事件。军事警察刑事调查负责人李·阿亚什（Lee Ayash）周五透露，两名以色列空军士兵因涉嫌在服役期间为伊朗情报部门从事间谍活动已被拘留约一个月。嫌疑人涉嫌传输有关军事系统、地点和高级人物的敏感信息。在调查初期，包括来自防空等敏感部队在内的其他士兵也被逮捕。案件仍在调查中。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇵🇱 Polish president lost something 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇵🇱 波兰总统丢了东西 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: A trader (or group) made a huge ~$760 million bet that oil prices would drop just minutes before news broke that the Strait of Hormuz was reopening. When the announcement came out, prices fell sharply (around 10–12%), meaning the position likely made a large profit. The timing looks unusually precise, which is why it’s drawing attention. Similar well-timed trades have happened around recent Iran-related announcements.
text_zh: 一位交易员（或团体）在霍尔木兹海峡即将重新开放的消息传出前几分钟，押注约7.6亿美元石油价格将下跌。当公告发布时，油价大幅下跌（约10-12%），这意味着该头寸可能获得了巨额利润。由于时机异常精准，这引起了人们的关注。近期与伊朗相关的公告发布前后，也曾出现过类似的精准交易。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Two Majors - English Channel: ⚡️ Two Majors #Report on the morning of April 18, 2026 ▪️ At night in the Leningrad region there were 27 enemy UAVs. In the area of the port of Vysotsk , there is a fire , which is currently being extinguished. In Sevastopol , a tank in the area of the Mikhailovskoe microdistrict is on fire. In the Krasnodar Kray, there was a fire at an oil depot in Tikhoretsk. More than a dozen UAVs were destroyed in the Rostov region . Several unmanned aerial vehicles were destroyed over Voronezh , and damage was recorded in a building under construction. The enemy is spreading footage of a fire at an oil refinery in Novokuybyshevsk, Samara region. ▪️ "Geranis" were operating in the area of the Belyara settlement in the Odessa region, Kharkov, Sumy region and Zaporozhye. ▪️ On the Sumy direction the Army Group"North" is fighting in the Shostka, Sumy, Krasnopolsky districts. The enemy is building anti-drone corridors on the main logistics routes from Kharkov to Liptsy and Chuguev in the rear. ▪️ The AFU continues to attack Belgorod . A 10-year-old child was injured. In Shebekino, a commercial object was attacked by a drone, and a woman was injured. In the same city, a truck driver was injured. In the village of Novaya Tavolzhanka, a man was seriously injured during an attack by an FPV drone. In the village of Yasnye Zori in the Belgorod region, a drone hit a motorcycle, killing the driver. In the Korochansky district, in the village of Melikhovo, a woman was injured by an enemy drone. There is a constant battle against swarms of enemy UAVs in the skies. ▪️ On the Kharkov direction in the Volchansk sector, assault units of the 69th Guards Motor Rifle Division of the 6th Army and the 71st Guards Motor Rifle Division of the 14th Army Corps of the "North" conducted fierce battles, driving out the nationalists from the village of Zybino of the 113th Territorial Defense Brigade. The enemy transferred assault units of the 214th Separate Motor Rifle Brigade "OPFOR" from the rear to this section of the front. Our forces are constantly striking the enemy's rear, using TOSes. ▪️ In the south of the Kupyansk direction , the presence of our forward small infantry groups near Novoosynove, close to Kovsharovka, is noted. ▪️ In Konstantynovka , fighting is ongoing in the city's industrial zone, near the zinc plant. To support the advance of our troops in the southwest, the Russian Aerospace Forces are using FAB-3000 bombs. The enemy is counterattacking. ▪️ On the Slavyansk direction , the Russian Armed Forces are approaching Ray-Aleksandrovka, covering the approaches to it from the flanks. There are heavy battles going on. ▪️ On the Dobropollsk direction , battles are going on north of Grishyno. The enemy still retains forces for counterattacks, and the network reports about a thwarted advance of the AFU in the area of the highway to Krasnoarmeysk (Pokrovsk). ▪️ In the Dnepropetrovsk region , the Army Group"East" continues to expand the zone of control northwest of the settlement of Alexandrovgrad in the direction of the settlement of Lesnoye. South of the line Velikomikhailovka - Pokrovsk, the enemy continues attempts to infiltrate into the depth of our troops' defenses, and infantry groups are being destroyed by UAV crews. There is a constant re-verification of the terrain. ▪️ In the Kherson region - daily attacks on many peaceful villages. In Veliki Kopany, a drone strike on a residential area resulted in a woman being injured. It's significant that the enemy is already hitting Skadovsk, which is 65 km ❗️ from the Dneper bank. The report was compiled by: ⚡️ Two Majors
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Two Majors - 英文频道：⚡️ Two Majors 2026年4月18日早间#报告 ▪️ 夜间列宁格勒地区出现了27架敌方无人机。维索茨克港地区发生火灾，目前正在扑救。在塞瓦斯托波尔，米哈伊洛夫斯基微区附近的一个油罐起火。在克拉斯诺达尔边疆区，季霍列茨克的一个油库发生火灾。罗斯托夫地区摧毁了十几架无人机。沃罗涅日上空摧毁了几架无人机，一栋在建建筑受损。敌方正在传播萨马拉地区新古比雪夫斯克炼油厂火灾的画面。 ▪️ “天竺葵”无人机在敖德萨地区、哈尔科夫、苏梅地区和扎波罗热的别利亚拉定居点附近活动。 ▪️ 在苏梅方向，“北方”集团军在肖斯特卡、苏梅、克拉斯诺波尔斯基区进行战斗。敌方正在哈尔科夫到利普齐和丘古耶夫的主要后勤路线上建立反无人机走廊。 ▪️ 乌克兰武装部队继续袭击别尔哥罗德。一名10岁儿童受伤。在舍别基诺，一个商业设施遭到无人机袭击，一名妇女受伤。在同一城市，一名卡车司机受伤。在新塔沃尔然卡村，一名男子在FPV无人机袭击中受重伤。在别尔哥罗德地区的亚斯内佐里村，一架无人机击中了一辆摩托车，导致驾驶员死亡。在科罗昌斯基区的梅利霍沃村，一名妇女被敌方无人机炸伤。天空中一直在与成群的敌方无人机进行战斗。 ▪️ 在哈尔科夫方向的沃尔昌斯克地段，“北方”集团军第6集团军第69近卫摩托化步兵师和第14军团第71近卫摩托化步兵师的突击部队进行了激烈的战斗，将民族主义者从第113国土防卫旅所在的齐比诺村赶走。敌方从后方将第214独立摩托化步兵旅“OPFOR”的突击部队调往该前线地段。我们的部队不断使用温压弹打击敌方后方。 ▪️ 在库皮扬斯克方向南部，注意到我们的小型前沿步兵小组出现在科夫沙罗夫卡附近的诺沃奥西诺韦附近。 ▪️ 在康斯坦丁诺夫卡，城市工业区锌厂附近正在进行战斗。为了支持我们部队向西南推进，俄罗斯空天军使用了FAB-3000炸弹。敌方正在反击。 ▪️ 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，俄罗斯武装部队正在接近拉伊-亚历山德罗夫卡，从侧翼覆盖其进路。战斗非常激烈。 ▪️ 在多布罗波尔斯克方向，格里希诺以北正在进行战斗。敌方仍保留反击力量，网络报道称乌克兰武装部队在通往红军城（波克罗夫斯克）的高速公路区域的推进受阻。 ▪️ 在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克地区，“东方”集团军继续扩大亚历山德罗夫格勒定居点西北方向往列斯诺耶定居点方向的控制区。在韦利科米哈伊洛夫卡-波克罗夫斯克线以南，敌方继续试图渗透到我们部队防御纵深，步兵小组被无人机小组摧毁。正在对地形进行持续的重新核实。 ▪️ 在赫尔松地区，每天都有针对许多和平村庄的袭击。在韦利基科帕内，无人机袭击居民区导致一名妇女受伤。值得注意的是，敌方已经开始打击距离第聂伯河岸65公里❗️的斯卡多夫斯克。报告编制：⚡️ Two Majors

text: The US quietly extended a short-term waiver letting already-shipped Russian oil be sold until May 16. The move reverses earlier signals that the waiver wouldn’t be renewed.
text_zh: 美国悄悄延长了一项短期豁免，允许已装运的俄罗斯石油在5月16日前进行销售。此举推翻了此前关于不会延长豁免的信号。

text: Drinking, Paranoia, Absences: FBI Chief Kash Patel A new The Atlantic report claims Kash Patel is often absent, erratic, and sometimes intoxicated on the job. Patel is described as “erratic,” “paranoid,” and frequently unreachable. — Reported heavy drinking causing missed or delayed duties. Example incident: panicked over being fired due to a simple IT lockout. Some officials see his behavior as a “potential national-security vulnerability” Patel’s response: “Print it, all false, I’ll see you in court — bring your checkbook.” His lawyer calls the story false and signals legal action.
text_zh: 酗酒、偏执、缺勤：FBI局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）。《大西洋月刊》的一篇新报道称，卡什·帕特尔在工作中经常缺勤、行为古怪，有时甚至处于醉酒状态。帕特尔被描述为“古怪”、“偏执”，且经常无法联系上。——据报道，酗酒导致其错过或延迟履行职责。典型事件：因简单的IT锁定而恐慌，担心被解雇。一些官员认为他的行为是“潜在的国家安全漏洞”。帕特尔的回应：“尽管刊登吧，全是假的，法庭见——带上你的支票簿。”他的律师称该报道不实，并暗示将采取法律行动。

text: OSINTdefender Five oil tankers that had been loitering outside Iran’s easternmost port in the Gulf of Oman were no longer visible in satellite imagery late this week, with the ships having left the gulf in the hours before President Trump’s blockade took effect around Iran. One of the vessels has since returned to an Iranian port, two others have turned around and the remaining two are being shadowed by U.S. Navy Arleigh Burke-class guided-missile destroyers in the Arabian Sea, a U.S. official tells the Washington Post. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：本周晚些时候的卫星图像显示，此前在阿曼湾伊朗最东端港口外徘徊的五艘油轮已不见踪影，这些船只在特朗普总统对伊朗实施封锁生效前的几个小时内离开了海湾。一位美国官员告诉《华盛顿邮报》，其中一艘船只此后已返回伊朗港口，另外两艘已掉头，其余两艘正在阿拉伯海被美国海军阿利·伯克级导弹驱逐舰跟踪。推文

text: 🐻 If you are starting to read the news and don't understand what's going on - here's our attempt to explain what happened in the past 24 hours: ➡️ Russia carried out a big attack on Dnepropetrovsk and energy facilities all over Ukraine ➡️ Al-Julani says the Golan i s Syrian land ➡️ Trump announced that the Strait of Hormuz is open and a lot of other stuff ( starts here ), which can be summed up as this . Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf stated "In one hour, the US president made seven claims. All seven were lies" , and you get a visualizaton of Market Manipulation Friday ➡️ Here's what Kpler, a market intelligence and data analytics firm specializing in commodity flows, primarily energy, has to say on today's news about the Strait of Hormuz ➡️ Iranian FM spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei comments on American claims about transferring enriched uranium , and says there has been no agreement about extending the ceasefire , and no new understanding about the ceasefire itself ➡️ Israel has agreed to a ceasefire in Lebanon, but considers the operation against Hezbollah unfinished, Netanyahu said , and Trump wants to "make Lebanon great again" ➡️ Belarusian President Lukashenko says that Trump showed the whole world that your United States of America is not omnipotent. ➡️ Zelensky threatens Lukashenko ➡️ British media finally got to Burkina Faso, and the answers weren't what they were looking for. Ibrahim Traore laughs in a British journalist's face after she claims 60% of his country is controlled by jihadists 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 如果你刚开始看新闻，却不明白发生了什么——这是我们试图解释过去24小时内发生的事情：➡️ 俄罗斯对第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克和乌克兰各地的能源设施发动了大规模袭击 ➡️ 阿尔-朱拉尼称戈兰高地是叙利亚的土地 ➡️ 特朗普宣布霍尔木兹海峡已开放以及其他许多事情（从这里开始），可以总结为：伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫表示“美国总统在一小时内提出了七项主张。这七项全是谎言”，你由此可以看到周五的市场操纵 ➡️ 以下是专门研究大宗商品流动（主要是能源）的市场情报和数据分析公司Kpler对今天关于霍尔木兹海峡的新闻的看法 ➡️ 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就美国关于转移浓缩铀的主张发表评论，并表示没有就延长停火达成协议，也没有关于停火本身的新谅解 ➡️ 内塔尼亚胡表示，以色列已同意在黎巴嫩停火，但认为针对真主党的行动尚未结束，而特朗普想要“让黎巴嫩再次伟大” ➡️ 白俄罗斯总统卢卡申科表示，特朗普向全世界表明，你们美利坚合众国并非全能。 ➡️ 泽连斯基威胁卢卡申科 ➡️ 英国媒体终于到了布基纳法索，但得到的答案并非他们所期待的。在英国记者声称该国60%的领土被圣战分子控制后，易卜拉欣·特拉奥雷当面嘲笑了她 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT OSINTdefender The USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78) and her Carrier Strike Group, who on Thursday hit 296-days at sea, surpassing the record for the longest deployed aircraft carrier since the end of the Cold War, has since transited the Suez Canal from the Eastern Mediterranean and is once again conducting operations in the Red Sea, in support of U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM), two defense officials tell the Associated Press. The Ford, which initially left the Red Sea in March, after suffering a severe ventilation fire that started in the ship’s laundry and resulted in damage to hundreds of berthings and other compartments, was expected to finally return to Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia after loitering for the last few weeks in the Eastern Mediterranean - with stops in Crete and Croatia. Though it appears that the carrier and its crew has yet again been ordered to remain on station near Iran until the arrival of the USS George H. W. Bush (CVN-77), who is currently taking the long way to the region around the Cape of Good Hope in Southern Africa. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT OSINTdefender 两名国防官员告诉美联社，杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（CVN-78）及其航母打击群周四在海上停留了296天，打破了冷战结束以来航空母舰最长部署时间的纪录。该航母打击群已从东地中海通过苏伊士运河，目前正在红海执行任务，以支持美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）。福特号此前因船上洗衣房引发严重通风火灾，导致数百个铺位和其他舱室受损，于三月离开红海。原本预计它在东地中海徘徊数周（期间停靠克里特岛和克罗地亚）后，最终将返回弗吉尼亚州的诺福克海军基地。但目前看来，该航母及其船员再次接到命令，需留在伊朗附近驻守，直到乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）抵达。布什号目前正绕道南非好望角前往该地区。推文

text: WarMonitor Pretty much sums it up. Peace when markets are open War when markets are closed - Aaron Rupar tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这基本上总结了一切。市场开放时和平，市场关闭时战争 - Aaron Rupar 推文

text: WarMonitor Iran’s media is tightly controlled, they can shape different narratives for domestic and global audiences. Reporter: You said everything has been agreed to. Iran was saying something different. Trump: They have to say something different because they have people they have to cater to. I’m just saying it like it is. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2045334154443952277/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊朗媒体受到严格管控，他们可以针对国内和全球受众塑造不同的叙事。记者：你说一切都已经达成一致。伊朗方面的说法却不同。特朗普：他们必须说点不同的，因为他们有需要迎合的对象。我只是实话实说。https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2045334154443952277/video/1 - Acyn 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Russia's Novokuibyshevsk Oil Refinery is ablaze this morning after a successful overnight Ukrainian drone attack. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045339072378405300/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 俄罗斯新古比雪夫斯克炼油厂今晨起火，此前乌克兰无人机连夜发动了成功袭击。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045339072378405300/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺 President Trump on reports of potential U.S. military action in Cuba: It depends on what your definition of military action is, as Bill Clinton would say. You understand that? No? A lot of people don't understand that. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on Iran’s’ enriched uranium: We'll go in with Iran and we will take it together and we will bring it back, 100% of it, back to the United States. If we don't do that, we will get it in a different form, in a much more unfriendly form. But in any event, we'll get it. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺 特朗普总统就有关美国可能在古巴采取军事行动的报道表示：这取决于你对军事行动的定义是什么，正如比尔·克林顿所说的那样。你明白吗？不明白？很多人都不明白。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普就伊朗的浓缩铀表示：我们将与伊朗合作，我们将共同获取它，并将其带回，100%带回美国。如果我们不这样做，我们将以另一种形式、一种极其不友好的形式得到它。但无论如何，我们都会得到它。@wfwitness

text: WarMonitor A federal judge in Illinois granted a preliminary injunction, finding plaintiffs are likely to succeed on claims the Trump administration pressured Apple and Facebook to remove ICE-tracking content, calling it “thinly veiled threats” that likely violated the First Amendment. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 伊利诺伊州的一名联邦法官发布了初步禁令，裁定原告很可能在指控特朗普政府向苹果和Facebook施压以删除追踪美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）内容一案中胜诉，称这些行为是“掩耳盗铃的威胁”，很可能违反了第一修正案。推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Navy’s Office of the Chief of Naval Operations (CNO) has denied reports from USA Today and other media outlets, which citied Sailors and Marines attached to the vessels, of food shortages and poor conditions onboard the USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN-72) and USS Tripoli (LHA-7) deployed to the Arabian Sea. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国海军作战部长办公室（CNO）否认了《今日美国》及其他媒体的报道。此前这些媒体援引了隶属于相关舰艇的海军水兵和海军陆战队员的话，称部署在阿拉伯海的“亚伯拉罕·林肯”号航空母舰（CVN-72）和“的黎波里”号两栖攻击舰（LHA-7）上存在食物短缺和条件恶劣的情况。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 President Trump said he may not extend a ceasefire if no deal is reached by Wednesday: Maybe I won’t extend it… and we’ll have to start dropping bombs again. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 President Trump on reports of potential U.S. military action in Cuba: It depends on what your definition of military action is, as Bill Clinton would say. You understand that? No? A lot of people don't understand that. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 特朗普总统表示，如果周三前未达成协议，他可能不会延长停火协议：也许我不会延长它……我们将不得不再次开始投掷炸弹。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 特朗普总统就有关美国可能在古巴采取军事行动的报道表示：正如比尔·克林顿所说，这取决于你对军事行动的定义是什么。你明白吗？不明白？很多人都不明白。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ "Woman, Life, Freedom?" See the true meaning of "Woman, Life, Freedom! Mass nationwide rally of Iranian women and girls in Tehran in support of the Islamic Republic of Iran. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

The restrictions are you can’t do the tolls. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump said he may not extend a ceasefire if no deal is reached by Wednesday: Maybe I won’t extend it… and we’ll have to start dropping bombs again. @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇧🇭 Last night at the 152nd IPU Assembly in Istanbul, Iranian delegation head Dr. Mottaki delivered a sharp rebuttal to the Bahraini representative: "The Bahraini representative spoke rudely, like an agent of America and Israel. " "Why did you station the U.S. terrorist Fifth Fleet in Bahrain? Your small country handed over 3 million square meters of land for this base, a base used to attack Iran. You are partners in their aggression." 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇧🇭 昨晚在伊斯坦布尔举行的第152届各国议会联盟大会上，伊朗代表团团长莫塔基博士对巴林代表进行了尖锐的反驳：“巴林代表说话粗鲁，就像美国和以色列的代理人一样。”“你们为什么要让美国恐怖主义第五舰队驻扎在巴林？你们这个小国为这个基地提供了300万平方米的土地，这个基地被用来攻击伊朗。你们是他们侵略行为的同伙。”🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NewsNation: U.S. President Trump said he may not extend the ceasefire with Iran when it expires next week, warning that the U.S. could resume military action if necessary. Trump said he might have to “start dropping bombs again,” while also expressing optimism that a deal is still likely, saying “I think it’s gonna happen.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NewsNation：美国总统特朗普表示，他可能不会在下周停火协议到期时延长与伊朗的停火协议，并警告称如有必要，美国可能会恢复军事行动。特朗普表示他可能不得不“再次开始投掷炸弹”，同时也对达成协议表示乐观，称“我认为这会发生的”。@wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index Trump's post about the Strait of Hormuz and meeting with China's president. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045328961975324711/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普关于霍尔木兹海峡和会见中国国家主席的帖子。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2045328961975324711/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 U.S. President Trump on Xi Jinping: President Xi is very happy that the Strait of Hormuz is open and/or rapidly opening. Our meeting in China will be a special one and, potentially, Historic. I look forward to being with President Xi — Much will be accomplished! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 美国总统特朗普谈习近平：习近平主席对于霍尔木兹海峡的开放和/或快速开放感到非常高兴。我们在中国的会晤将是一次特别的，且极具历史意义的会晤。我期待与习近平主席会面——我们将取得巨大成就！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇷🇺U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent confirmed that the U.S. will not renew waivers on Iranian and Russia oil. "We will not be renewing the general license on Russian oil, and we will not be renewing the general license on Iranian oil. Because, again…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 The U.S. Treasury has issued a new licence extending relief on sanctions covering Russian crude oil and petroleum products for an additional month, now valid through May 16. This comes after U.S. Treasury Secretary said that the U.S. wasn’t going to extend waivers on Russian oil sanctions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇷🇺美国财政部长贝森特证实，美国将不会延长对伊朗和俄罗斯石油的豁免。“我们将不会延长俄罗斯石油的通用许可证，也不会延长伊朗石油的通用许可证。因为，再次重申……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国财政部已发布一项新许可证，将俄罗斯原油和石油产品的制裁豁免期延长一个月，有效期至5月16日。此前，美国财政部长曾表示美国不会延长对俄罗斯石油制裁的豁免。 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Of course they did. The US dropped a Friday night notice lifting sanctions on Russian oil for another month. Comes just 2 days after Treasury Secretary Bessant said the US would not renew the waiver. - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 他们当然会这么做。美国在周五晚上发布通知，将俄罗斯石油的制裁豁免期再延长一个月。这距离财政部长贝森特（Bessant）表示美国不会延长豁免期仅过了两天。—— OSINTtechnical 推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 The US Treasury has authorized transactions involving Russian oil until May 16. The exemption covers oil and petroleum products loaded onto tankers before April 17. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇷🇺 美国财政部已授权涉及俄罗斯石油的交易至5月16日。该豁免涵盖在4月17日之前装载到油轮上的石油和石油产品。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 It's funny because you are watching Trump's intelligence briefing right now. Also, can someone at Fox News please tell Jesse Watters to ease up on the makeup. The man looks like a blow-up doll Mark Rutte would order online. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 这很有趣，因为你现在正在看特朗普的情报简报。另外，福克斯新闻（Fox News）能不能有人告诉杰西·沃特斯（Jesse Watters）少化点妆。这家伙看起来就像马克·吕特（Mark Rutte）会从网上订购的充气娃娃。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical Ukrainian kinetic sanctions on Russian oil remain in effect tonight, with attack drones setting a Russian oil depot in Sevastopol ablaze. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045305226484146330/photo/1 The US dropped a Friday night notice lifting sanctions on Russian oil for another month. Comes just 2 days after Treasury Secretary Bessant said the US would not renew the waiver. - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：针对俄罗斯石油的乌克兰动能制裁今晚依然有效，攻击无人机点燃了塞瓦斯托波尔的一个俄罗斯油库。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045305226484146330/photo/1 美国周五晚间发布通知，将俄罗斯石油制裁豁免期延长一个月。就在两天前，财政部长贝桑特还表示美国不会续签该豁免。——OSINTtechnical推文

text: U.S. Central Command Guided-missile destroyer USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112) patrols the Arabian Sea, April 17, as U.S. forces enforce the naval blockade on ships attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. Since commencement of the blockade, 21 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around and return to Iran. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：导弹驱逐舰“迈克尔·墨菲”号（DDG 112）于4月17日在阿拉伯海巡逻，美军正在执行针对试图进出伊朗港口的船只的海上封锁。自封锁开始以来，已有21艘船只遵从美军指令掉头返回伊朗。推文

text: 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 Every single time. The US propaganda is running out of ideas. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 每次都这样。美国的宣传手段已经黔驴技穷了。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. CENTCOM: Guided-missile destroyer USS Michael Murphy (DDG 112) patrols the Arabian Sea, April 17, as U.S. forces enforce the naval blockade on ships attempting to enter or exit Iranian ports. Since commencement of the blockade, 21 ships have complied with direction from U.S. forces to turn around and return to Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部：导弹驱逐舰“迈克尔·墨菲”号（DDG 112）于4月17日在阿拉伯海巡逻，美军正在执行针对试图进出伊朗港口的船只的海上封锁。自封锁开始以来，已有21艘船只遵从美军指令掉头返回伊朗。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺U.S. President Trump promised to bring about a new dawn for Cuba. "Will also bring about a day, seventy years in waiting. It's called a new dawn for Cuba. We're gonna help them out with Cuba. We have a lot of great Cuban Americans. Not too many people…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump says he has directed secretary of war Pete Hegseth to release UFO related government documents: We found many very interesting documents, I must say. And the first releases will begin very, very soon. So you can go out and see if that phenomena is. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇺美国总统特朗普承诺为古巴带来新的曙光。“也将带来等待了七十年的那一天。这被称为古巴的新曙光。我们将帮助他们解决古巴问题。我们有很多伟大的古巴裔美国人。没有太多人……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普表示，他已指示战争部长皮特·海格塞斯解密与UFO相关的政府文件：我必须说，我们发现了许多非常有趣的文件。第一批解密文件很快就会发布。所以你们可以去看看那到底是什么现象。@wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical The US dropped a Friday night notice lifting sanctions on Russian oil for another month. Comes just 2 days after Treasury Secretary Bessant said the US would not renew the waiver. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国周五晚间发布通知，将俄罗斯石油制裁的豁免期延长一个月。就在两天前，财政部长贝桑特（Bessant）还表示美国不会延长该豁免。推文
